explanations.8: The three dots (...) here means 'copy all the properties from MDXComponents into this object', so we inherit the default behavior for other components.
explanations.11: The first part before the equals sign pulls out specific props we want to handle separately, and the ...rest collects all the remaining props we don't explicitly name.
explanations.15: The {...rest} spreads those leftover props back onto the img element so we don't lose any attributes we didn't explicitly extract.
explanations.20: This uses the 'or' operator (||) to provide a default value—if loading wasn't passed in, we use 'lazy' instead.
explanations.22: The backticks allow us to embed the className variable into a template string; the || '' part ensures we at least have an empty string if className is undefined.
